title: Pi Agent explained in 6min..
summary: Pi is described as a unique agentic framework that offers novel ways to harness and deploy AI capabilities. The video compares Pi's framework architecture against competing agent products like Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, and Antigravity in terms of harness complexity and feature richness.
